# Agent Self State Management

Use /dream to update these files with new state information and generate dream state ideas for future implementation cycles.

Review the context files for structure and content guidelines, and refer to the progress and heartbeat files for examples of how to document state updates.

Leverage higher temperature creativity for dream state ideation, but keep the current state updates grounded in concrete evidence and recent events to maintain alignment with true will and reduce drift.

Focus on the VSCode extension implementation for now, but consider how the state management practices can be applied to other agents and subagents in the future, especially with WASM and graphical multi-user and multi-agent shared experiences.
